channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.23 (Build 20260606.1)
item.description:
What's New

fix(sync): auto-trigger iCloud sync for macros and window title rules

Macro changes (add/edit/delete) now notify observers so iCloudSyncManager schedules a push; previously setMacrosData wrote silently and edits never synced. Macro sync identity migrated from per-device UUID to the stable 'text' business key so a delete on one Mac matches the same macro on another and merges collapse duplicates.

Window Title Rules: setWindowTitleRulesData now notifies (push trigger); editing a rule preserves its original UUID instead of minting a new one (avoids delete+add duplication on peers and keeps list position); applyRulesFromSync posts windowTitleRulesDidChange so the engine (AppBehaviorDetector.customRules) and the open Settings tab reload instead of staying stale until restart.

iCloudSyncManager.applyEnvelope pull-merge now includes local tombstones in the local payload, so a fresh local delete is preserved by last-write-wins rather than being resurrected by a stale remote live entry (affected all per-entry-merge categories).

SyncCollectionPayload.merged preserves deterministic insertion order (local first, new remote appended) instead of Array(map.values), which scrambled Window Title Rule cascade priority on every merge.

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
